No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level language course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters cultural appreciation (Target 4.7).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Learning Chinese can enhance employability and provide skills for decent jobs, aligning with Target 8.5.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Language learning facilitates cross-cultural communication, indirectly promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description supports contributions to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and 'use genuine books' explicitly promotes responsible consumption of educational materials (Target 12.8).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Language learning is a foundational skill for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) and capacity-building (Target 17.9).
